meaning: The requirement for government officials to explain their actions and decisions, and accept responsibility if they make mistakes.
definition: The requirement for government officials to explain their actions and decisions, and accept responsibility if they make mistakes.
example: The city council must show accountability by explaining how tax money was spent.
exampleHindi: नगर परिषद को यह बताकर जवाबदेही दिखानी चाहिए कि कर का पैसा कैसे खर्च किया गया।

meaning: A group of people who gather together for a shared purpose, often to make laws or discuss public matters.
definition: A group of people who gather together for a shared purpose, often to make laws or discuss public matters.
example: The state assembly met to debate the new budget proposed by the governor.
exampleHindi: राज्यपाल द्वारा प्रस्तावित नए बजट पर बहस के लिए राज्य विधानसभा की बैठक हुई।

meaning: A large, complex system of government administration run by non-elected officials who follow strict rules.
definition: A large, complex system of government administration run by non-elected officials who follow strict rules.
example: It took months of dealing with government bureaucracy just to get a permit to open the restaurant.
exampleHindi: रेस्तरां खोलने की अनुमति प्राप्त करने के लिए सरकारी नौकरशाही से निपटने में महीनों लग गए।

meaning: A local law made by a city or town government that applies only to that area.
definition: A local law made by a city or town government that applies only to that area.
example: Under the city by-law, dogs must be kept on a leash in all public parks.
exampleHindi: शहर के उपनियम के तहत, सभी सार्वजनिक पार्कों में कुत्तों को पट्टे पर रखा जाना चाहिए।

example: As a citizen, you have the right to vote and the duty to obey the nation's laws.
exampleHindi: एक नागरिक के रूप में, आपको वोट देने का अधिकार और देश के कानूनों का पालन करने का कर्तव्य है।

meaning: A group of elected officials who govern a city and vote on local laws and budgets.
definition: A group of elected officials who govern a city and vote on local laws and budgets.
example: The city council voted to approve the construction of a new bike lane downtown.
exampleHindi: नगर परिषद ने शहर में एक नई बाइक लेन के निर्माण को मंजूरी देने के लिए मतदान किया।

meaning: Something that a citizen has a legal or moral responsibility to do, such as voting or serving on a jury.
definition: Something that a citizen has a legal or moral responsibility to do, such as voting or serving on a jury.
example: Serving on a jury when called is a fundamental civic duty that supports the justice system.
exampleHindi: बुलाए जाने पर जूरी में सेवा करना एक मौलिक नागरिक कर्तव्य है जो न्याय प्रणाली का समर्थन करता है।

meaning: Active participation by citizens in the life of their community to make it better.
definition: Active participation by citizens in the life of their community to make it better.
example: Voting in elections and volunteering at local charities are great examples of civic engagement.
exampleHindi: चुनावों में मतदान करना और स्थानीय दान में स्वयंसेवा करना नागरिक सहभागिता के महान उदाहरण हैं।

meaning: The permanent, professional branches of government administration, where staff are hired based on qualifications rather than political connections.
definition: The permanent, professional branches of government administration, where staff are hired based on qualifications rather than political connections.
example: He chose a career in the civil service to help improve public transportation systems in his city.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने अपने शहर में सार्वजनिक परिवहन प्रणालियों को बेहतर बनाने में मदद करने के लिए सिविल सेवा में करियर चुना।

meaning: Moving power and decision-making from a single central government office to local offices in different areas.
definition: Moving power and decision-making from a single central government office to local offices in different areas.
example: The decentralization of the education department gave individual schools more control over their budgets.
exampleHindi: शिक्षा विभाग के विकेंद्रीकरण ने व्यक्तिगत स्कूलों को अपने बजट पर अधिक नियंत्रण दिया।

meaning: The process where a poor urban neighborhood is changed by wealthier people moving in, improving housing but displacing poorer residents.
definition: The process where a poor urban neighborhood is changed by wealthier people moving in, improving housing but displacing poorer residents.
example: The gentrification of the historic neighborhood caused property taxes to rise, forcing many families to move away.
exampleHindi: ऐतिहासिक पड़ोस के सभ्यताकरण के कारण संपत्ति कर में वृद्धि हुई, जिससे कई परिवारों को दूर जाने के लिए मजबूर होना पड़ा।

meaning: The basic physical structures and systems needed for a society to function, like roads, bridges, and power lines.
definition: The basic physical and digital systems needed for technology to work â€” servers, cables, and data centres.
example: The government is investing billions of dollars to repair the country's aging infrastructure.
exampleHindi: सरकार देश के पुराने बुनियादी ढांचे की मरम्मत के लिए अरबों डॉलर का निवेश कर रही है।

meaning: The level of government that manages towns, cities, or counties, handling local issues rather than national ones.
definition: The level of government that manages towns, cities, or counties, handling local issues rather than national ones.
example: The local government decided to build a new community library in the town center.
exampleHindi: स्थानीय सरकार ने शहर के केंद्र में एक नया सामुदायिक पुस्तकालय बनाने का निर्णय लिया।

meaning: The elected leader of a city, town, or municipality.
definition: The elected leader of a city, town, or municipality.
example: The mayor announced a new plan to build affordable housing for low-income families.
exampleHindi: मेयर ने कम आय वाले परिवारों के लिए किफायती आवास बनाने की एक नई योजना की घोषणा की।

meaning: A city, town, or local area that has its own local government.
definition: A city, town, or local area that has its own local government.
example: The municipality is responsible for trash collection, local roads, and public parks.
exampleHindi: नगर पालिका कचरा संग्रहण, स्थानीय सड़कों और सार्वजनिक पार्कों के लिए जिम्मेदार है।

meaning: An official appointed to investigate complaints by individuals against government departments or public authorities.
definition: An official appointed to investigate complaints by individuals against government departments or public authorities.
example: If you feel a government agency treated you unfairly, you can file a complaint with the ombudsman.
exampleHindi: यदि आपको लगता है कि किसी सरकारी एजेंसी ने आपके साथ गलत व्यवहार किया है, तो आप लोकपाल के पास शिकायत दर्ज कर सकते हैं।

meaning: A law passed by a local government, such as a city or county.
definition: A law passed by a local government, such as a city or county.
example: The town passed a noise ordinance banning loud music after 10:00 PM.
exampleHindi: शहर ने रात 10:00 बजे के बाद तेज़ संगीत पर प्रतिबंध लगाने वाला एक शोर अध्यादेश पारित किया।

meaning: A formal meeting where citizens can voice their opinions on proposed laws, projects, or budgets.
definition: A formal meeting where citizens can voice their opinions on proposed laws, projects, or budgets.
example: The town held a public hearing to listen to residents' concerns about the new highway project.
exampleHindi: शहर में नई राजमार्ग परियोजना के बारे में निवासियों की चिंताओं को सुनने के लिए एक सार्वजनिक सुनवाई आयोजित की गई।

meaning: A government database of official records that the public can look at, such as land ownership or birth records.
definition: A government database of official records that the public can look at, such as land ownership or birth records.
example: You can check the public registry to find out who owns the property next to your house.
exampleHindi: आप यह पता लगाने के लिए सार्वजनिक रजिस्ट्री की जांच कर सकते हैं कि आपके घर के बगल की संपत्ति का मालिक कौन है।

meaning: The part of the economy that is owned, managed, and funded by the government.
definition: The part of the economy that is owned, managed, and funded by the government.
example: Public schools, hospitals, and police departments are all part of the public sector.
exampleHindi: पब्लिक स्कूल, अस्पताल और पुलिस विभाग सभी सार्वजनिक क्षेत्र का हिस्सा हैं।

meaning: A person who works for the government or in public services, such as a teacher, firefighter, or postal worker.
definition: A person who works for the government or in public services, such as a teacher, firefighter, or postal worker.
example: Police officers are public servants who work daily to keep our neighborhoods safe.
exampleHindi: पुलिस अधिकारी लोक सेवक हैं जो हमारे पड़ोस को सुरक्षित रखने के लिए प्रतिदिन काम करते हैं।

meaning: A service that is essential to the public, such as electricity, water, or gas, often regulated or run by the government.
definition: A service that is essential to the public, such as electricity, water, or gas, often regulated or run by the government.
example: The local public utility worked quickly to restore water service after the pipe broke.
exampleHindi: पाइप टूटने के बाद स्थानीय सार्वजनिक उपयोगिता ने जल सेवा बहाल करने के लिए तेजी से काम किया।

meaning: Building and repair projects done by the government for the community, such as roads, schools, and sewers.
definition: Building and repair projects done by the government for the community, such as roads, schools, and sewers.
example: The department of public works is responsible for paving roads and clearing snow during the winter.
exampleHindi: लोक निर्माण विभाग सर्दियों के दौरान सड़कें बनाने और बर्फ साफ करने के लिए जिम्मेदार है।

meaning: Excessive rules, paperwork, and official procedures that slow down government actions and decisions.
definition: Excessive rules, paperwork, and official procedures that slow down government actions and decisions.
example: The small business owner complained that red tape made it extremely difficult to get a business license.
exampleHindi: छोटे व्यवसाय के मालिक ने शिकायत की कि लालफीताशाही के कारण व्यवसाय लाइसेंस प्राप्त करना बेहद कठिन हो गया है।

meaning: A person who lives in a particular place, even if they are not a citizen of that country.
definition: A person who lives in a particular place, even if they are not a citizen of that country.
example: Although she is a foreign student, she is a resident of this city and pays local sales tax.
exampleHindi: हालाँकि वह एक विदेशी छात्रा है, वह इसी शहर की निवासी है और स्थानीय बिक्री कर का भुगतान करती है।

meaning: The process by which the government collects money, such as taxes and fees, to fund public services.
definition: The process by which the government collects money, such as taxes and fees, to fund public services.
example: Effective revenue collection allows the city to maintain roads, parks, and schools.
exampleHindi: प्रभावी राजस्व संग्रह शहर को सड़कों, पार्कों और स्कूलों को बनाए रखने की अनुमति देता है।

meaning: An unspoken agreement where citizens give up some freedoms to the government in exchange for protection of their rights.
definition: An unspoken agreement where citizens give up some freedoms to the government in exchange for protection of their rights.
example: According to the social contract theory, citizens obey laws because the government protects their safety and property.
exampleHindi: सामाजिक अनुबंध सिद्धांत के अनुसार, नागरिक कानूनों का पालन करते हैं क्योंकि सरकार उनकी सुरक्षा और संपत्ति की रक्षा करती है।

meaning: A local government building, or an open meeting where local politicians answer questions from residents.
definition: A local government building, or an open meeting where local politicians answer questions from residents.
example: The senator hosted a town hall meeting to discuss the new healthcare law with her constituents.
exampleHindi: सीनेटर ने अपने मतदाताओं के साथ नए स्वास्थ्य देखभाल कानून पर चर्चा करने के लिए एक टाउन हॉल बैठक की मेजबानी की।

meaning: The practice of keeping government actions, records, and decisions open and clear so the public can see them.
definition: The condition of being open and not secretive (strong alternative to 'openness').
example: To ensure transparency, the government publishes its spending reports online for everyone to read.
exampleHindi: पारदर्शिता सुनिश्चित करने के लिए, सरकार सभी के पढ़ने के लिए अपनी व्यय रिपोर्ट ऑनलाइन प्रकाशित करती है।

meaning: Rules about how land in a city or town can be used, such as for houses, stores, or factories.
definition: Rules about how land in a city or town can be used, such as for houses, stores, or factories.
example: The zoning laws in this neighborhood do not allow tall commercial buildings to be constructed.
exampleHindi: इस पड़ोस में ज़ोनिंग कानून ऊंची व्यावसायिक इमारतों के निर्माण की अनुमति नहीं देते हैं।
